# Context notes

Free-form prose that matches no artifact kind and defines no governed
identifiers — the file class that was dropped wholesale before plan 017's
catch-all (field-evidence C13).

## Operating notes

The nightly job template uses `{{ link_count }}` placeholders and the runbook
keeps a literal `TODO` marker inside code spans — both legitimate content, not
unfinished markers (field-evidence C14).

## Delivery ladder

P1 ships the shortener, P2 the statistics page, P3 the batched counters — the
prose-only phase ladder that a table-oriented parser cannot see.
